title: astragalus nigrifructus
intro: Astragalus nigrifructus, also known as Huangqi or Black Seed Astragalus, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus nigrifructus include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and increased endurance, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus nigrifructus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, teas, and decoctions, allowing for easy incorporation into a health regimen.
